title: CIP-309 content-hash map
description: A non-empty CBOR map keyed by content-hash algorithm identifier (a text string from the hash-algorithm registry) whose value is the corresponding digest. STRUCTURAL view: each value is modelled as a 32-byte hex string (the only registered digest length), and the map MUST have at least one entry. The key is left OPEN (any non-empty string) — registry membership (UNSUPPORTED_HASH_ALG) and per-algorithm digest-length agreement (HASH_DIGEST_LENGTH_MISMATCH) are domain-pass checks. CBOR byte strings are modelled as lowercase-hex JSON strings; a 32-byte digest is 64 hex characters.
